APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
John David Barry Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Gary Schefsky
Robert Eisenbach, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Broad Street San Francisco, LLC

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Gary Schefsky, euro Worldwide Investments, Inc.'s Application For Writ Of Attachment is denied. The court does not find that any award would be ineffectual and further does not find that the award is fixed and readily ascertainable. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
